heroHeadline: Gaza Marks Six Months of Ceasefire: 738 Killed, 'Neither War Nor Peace'
heroSubtitle: April 10, 2026 marks exactly six months since the US-brokered Gaza ceasefire took effect. Israeli forces have killed 738 Palestinians since the ceasefire, bombing Gaza on 36 of the last 40 days. The total death toll has reached 72,317. Only 21% of promised aid trucks have entered Gaza. The UN Commission of Inquiry warns the Iran war has eclipsed a surge in Palestinian human rights violations.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
